description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow set on a landscaped plot with a driveway, garage, and a backyard featuring a swimming pool and patio area. The structure is characterized by clean, rectilinear lines, flat roofs, and a mix of white and natural-toned exterior finishes. Large windows and sliding glass doors are distributed asymmetrically, providing ample natural light and views of the surrounding greenery. The front of the house includes a covered carport and a paved entryway, while the rear opens to a private outdoor living space with a pool and seating area. The property is bordered by a mix of trees and open lawn, creating a sense of privacy and integration with nature. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, functionality, and a strong connection between indoor and outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with flat roofs, large windows, a garage, and a backyard pool, set on a landscaped lot with trees and open lawn.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the bungalow from an angled front perspective, highlighting the driveway, garage, and the main entrance with adjacent landscaping.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the bungalow from the backyard, showcasing the swimming pool, patio, and extensive rear windows opening to the outdoor living area.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the opposite side of the bungalow, revealing the side lawn, additional windows, and the pool area from a different angle.
description_view_3: View 3 provides a direct front view, focusing on the driveway, garage, and main entrance, with trees lining the property edges.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
